project_request: AI log analysis tool that detects anomalies, clusters errors, and suggests fixes.

questions.question: What log formats should the analyzer support out of the box?
options: JSON + plain text + common formats (Apache, Nginx, Syslog)

questions.question: How should the AI handle log volume — should it analyze all logs or sample?
options: Smart sampling with full analysis on anomalies

questions.question: Should the tool support real-time streaming analysis or batch-only?
What level of root cause analysis is expected?
options: Pattern detection only — group similar errors
Pattern detection + probable root cause suggestion
Full root cause analysis with suggested code fixes
